name: treeui
description: Clean components for modern Vue products.

scripts.clean: pnpm -w exec rimraf coverage playwright-report test-results apps/docs/storybook-static "packages/*/dist"
scripts.build:site: pnpm build:packages && pnpm build:landing && pnpm build:docs && pnpm build:docs:react && pnpm build:examples && node scripts/assemble-site.mjs
scripts.build:packages: pnpm --filter @treeui/tokens build && pnpm --filter @treeui/utils build && pnpm --filter @treeui/icons build && pnpm --filter @treeui/vue build && pnpm --filter @treeui/react build && pnpm --filter @treeui/mcp build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @treeui/tokens typecheck && pnpm --filter @treeui/utils typecheck && pnpm --filter @treeui/icons typecheck && pnpm --filter @treeui/vue typecheck && pnpm --filter @treeui/react typecheck && pnpm --filter @treeui/mcp typecheck && pnpm --filter @treeui/docs typecheck && pnpm --filter @treeui/docs-react typecheck && pnpm --filter @treeui/landing typecheck && pnpm --filter @treeui/example-dashboard-vue typecheck && pnpm --filter @treeui/example-dashboard-react typecheck
scripts.release: pnpm build:packages && pnpm -w exec changeset publish
